title: Deadfast 20300393 Mouse and Rat Killer Plus Poison, 15 Sachets - Green
features: Mouse and rat killer paste contains an advanced active ingredient (difethialone) that currently has no known resistance in rodents
Product is formulated to ensure rodents consume a lethal does the first time, making this bait ideal even for high infestations
Product is ready to use and can be used indoors and outdoors
Pack contains 15 sachets (house mouse low infestations apply 5 sachets every 2- 3 meters)
description: From the manufacturer Deadfast Mouse & Rat Killer Plus Sachet Kills in a Single Dose Our baits use the most innovative anticoagulant in the market, called Difethialone. This active ingredient has no known genetic resistant in rodents and is proven to be effective at a low concentration (25ppm), ensuring rodents consume a lethal dose the first time. That’s why you can use our baits with confidence for any rodent infestation. The bait comes in a ready-to-use “chew through” sachet that contains a soft texture paste, made with whole grains and vegetable ingredients for the highest palatability, so is capable to outcompete any processes or prepared food. The sachet maintain its freshness, flavour and attractiveness even at high temperatures, thanks to its limited oil release technology. Key Benefits Kills in a single dose Advanced active ingredient, effective at 25ppm Highest palatability For use indoors & outdoors around buildings Limited oil release Easy & clean to use No need to unwrap 15 & 8 sachet available Ready-to-use Paste Sachet Deadfast Mouse & Rat Killer Plus Sachets combines the efficacy of our active ingredient with the highest palatability for enhanced performance. It outcompetes any processed, stored or prepared food. •Ready to use, no need to unwrap •Sachet protects bait for easier baiting •Made with a micro-porous film, to allow rodents to detect the attractive smell •Contains no wax •Stable at a high temperatures, so it will not melt in the station •Easy to see when bait has been consumed How to Use Tips Deadfast Mouse & Rat Killer Plus Sachets can be used indoor or outdoors around buildings. The baits Must be placed inside a tamper resistant bait station by law, to protect and avoid children, pets and wildlife accessing the bait. When placing the station, make sure its secured so it can’t be dragged away. Do not clean up the area before the treatment, as this only disturbs the rodent environment and makes bait acceptance more difficult to achieve. Before using, please Read All The Instuctions Of Use , to make sure the right bait distance and quantity is used, depending on level of infestation and type of rodent. To dispose of the dead rodent, use gloves and tools such as tongs to make sure you don’t touch the rodent. Use a double plastic bag to dispose and place in a waste bin with a secure lid to prevent access of wildlife or pets. Always read the full label and product information before use .
